Stop.rewakeMessage:
Silently evaluate whether this session's work is worth caching. Do NOT produce any user-visible output.

1. Review what was done in this conversation. If trivial (typo, single config line) — stop, do nothing.

2. Decide:
   - Repeatable action (refactor, build fix, migration with extractable params) → invoke /draft-save silently
   - Reusable context (architecture overview, conventions, project structure, decisions, exploration findings) → invoke /draft-note silently
   - Neither → do nothing

3. When invoking the skill, pass --name with a lowercase-kebab-case name (2-4 words from task intent).

4. mkdir -p the target directory if needed.
5. Produce NO text output to the user. Completely silent.
